name: invoiced
description: Reads and writes the documented Invoiced REST API surface for billing, payments, subscriptions, events, and related resources.

risk.read: external Invoiced API read of billing, customer, payment, subscription, and event data
risk.write: live Invoiced API mutations can create, update, send, charge, refund, void, cancel, or delete billing records
risk.approval: reverse ETL writes require plan, preview, approval token, and destructive confirmation for delete/void/cancel/payment operations
